description: A security-camera still of an interior corridor with a tiled floor marked by yellow directional arrows, a service counter with monitors on the left, a standing fan, and doors marked 'EXIT' at the far end where a person stands beside a wheeled cart. A timestamp in the upper left reads '11:42:46 3/5/2026'. A red arrow has been added pointing toward the person at the end of the corridor. A video-player control bar runs along the bottom of the screenshot.
